---
title: "Drop test Experiment"
date: today
date-format: long
author: 
  - name: |
      Manuel Cabral <br> Lecturer: Gabriel D. Weymouth
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-color: "#00ADEF"
  # Set the white logo as a background image for the title slide
  data-background-image: "imgs/TUDelft_logo_white.png"
  # Position and size the logo as a background element
  data-background-position: "bottom 10px right 30px" # Adjust position
  data-background-size: "170px"  
format:
  revealjs: 
    # embed-resources: true
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: 
      theme: whiteboard
      buttons: true
    preview-links: auto
    logo: imgs/TUDelft_logo.png 
    css: styles.css
---

## 1. Drop test: Setup

::: columns

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](imgs/drop_test.png){width=72.5%}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](imgs/shapes_volume.png){width=100%}
<br><br>
![](imgs/order_cd.png){width=100%}
:::

:::

## 1. Drop test: Setup

::: columns

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](imgs/drop_test.png){width=72.5%}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](imgs/shapes_volume_final.png){width=100%}
:::

:::

## 1. Drop test: Drop time

::: columns

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](imgs/drop_test.png){width=72.5%}
:::

::: {.column width="50%" .v-center}
a. What is the object's terminal velocity?
:::

:::

## 1. Drop test: Experiment

<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 100%;">
  <div style="font-size: 200%; text-align: center;">
    Let's try it!
  </div>
</div>

## 1. Drop test: Experiment Results

$$
\begin{aligned}
T_{sphere} &= \qquad\quad &C_d = \qquad\qquad C_{d,theo} &= 0.45 \\\\
T_{ellipsoid} &= \qquad\quad &C_d = \qquad\qquad C_{d,theo} &= 0.30 \\\\
T_{bullet} &= \qquad\quad &C_d = \qquad\qquad C_{d,theo} &= 0.65\\\\
T_{NACA} &= \qquad\quad &C_d = \qquad\qquad C_{d,theo} &= 0.15
\end{aligned}
$$

## 1. Drop test: Analysis

![](videos/tracker_bullet.webm){width=100%}

## 1. Drop test: Experiment Results

$$
\begin{aligned}
T_{sphere} &= 3.63s \qquad &C_d = 0.78 \quad\qquad C_{d,theo} &= 0.45 \\\\
T_{ellipsoid} &= 2.82s \quad &C_d = 0.47 \quad\qquad C_{d,theo} &= 0.30 \\\\
T_{bullet} &= 3.08s \qquad &C_d = 0.56 \quad\qquad C_{d,theo} &= 0.65\\\\
T_{NACA} &= 1.95s \qquad &C_d = 0.23 \quad\qquad C_{d,theo} &= 0.15
\end{aligned}
$$


## 1. Drop test: Analysis
::: columns

::: {.column width="27%"}
![](videos/exp_sphere.mp4){width=100%}
:::

::: {.column width="73%"}
![](imgs/tracker_sphere.png){width=100%}
:::

:::


## 1. Drop test: Coefficient of drag

![](imgs/shapes_ordered_cd.png){width=50px}

## 1. Drop test: Coefficient of drag

![](imgs/shapes_sph_elli.png){width=50px}

## 1. Drop test: Numerical Simulation


<div style="display: flex; 
            align-items: center; 
            justify-content: center; /* <-- Changed to 'center' for minimum horizontal gap */
            width: 100%; 
            margin-top: -250px;       /* <-- INCREASED: Pulls content higher (adjust this value) */
            margin-bottom: 0px;         
            gap: 0px;">                   

  <video src="videos/Sphere.mp4" 
         data-autoplay  
         style="transform: rotate(-90deg); 
                height: 1000px; /* <-- INCREASED: Makes the video physically larger */
                width: auto;
                margin: 0;"></video>
  
  <video src="videos/Prolate.mp4"
         data-autoplay  
         style="transform: rotate(-90deg); 
                height: 1000px; /* <-- INCREASED: Makes the video physically larger */
                width: auto;
                margin: 0;"></video>
  
  <img src="imgs/qr_code.png" style="width: 500px; height: auto;">

  <img src="imgs/tzy_git.png" style="width: 500px; height: auto;">
  
</div>

## 1. Drop test: Coefficient of drag

![](imgs/shapes_sph_bul.png){width=50px}

## 1. Drop test: Numerical Simulation


<div style="display: flex; 
            align-items: center; 
            justify-content: center; /* <-- Changed to 'center' for minimum horizontal gap */
            width: 100%; 
            margin-top: -250px;       /* <-- INCREASED: Pulls content higher (adjust this value) */
            margin-bottom: 0px;         
            gap: 0px;">                   

  <video src="videos/Sphere.mp4" autoplay loop muted 
         data-autoplay  
         style="transform: rotate(-90deg); 
                height: 1000px; /* <-- INCREASED: Makes the video physically larger */
                width: auto;
                margin: 0;"></video>
  
  <video src="videos/Bullet.mp4" autoplay loop muted
         data-autoplay   
         style="transform: rotate(-90deg); 
                height: 1000px; /* <-- INCREASED: Makes the video physically larger */
                width: auto;
                margin: 0;"></video>
  
  <img src="imgs/qr_code.png" style="width: 500px; height: auto;">

  <img src="imgs/tzy_git.png" style="width: 500px; height: auto;">
  
</div>

## 1. Drop test: Coefficient of drag

![](imgs/shapes_sph_naca.png){width=50px}

## 1. Drop test: Numerical Simulation


<div style="display: flex; 
            align-items: center; 
            justify-content: center; /* <-- Changed to 'center' for minimum horizontal gap */
            width: 100%; 
            margin-top: -250px;       /* <-- INCREASED: Pulls content higher (adjust this value) */
            margin-bottom: 0px;         
            gap: 0px;">                   

  <video src="videos/Sphere.mp4" autoplay loop muted 
         data-autoplay  
         style="transform: rotate(-90deg); 
                height: 1000px; /* <-- INCREASED: Makes the video physically larger */
                width: auto;
                margin: 0;"></video>
  
  <video src="videos/Teardrop.mp4" autoplay loop muted
         data-autoplay   
         style="transform: rotate(-90deg); 
                height: 1000px; /* <-- INCREASED: Makes the video physically larger */
                width: auto;
                margin: 0;"></video>
  
  <img src="imgs/qr_code.png" style="width: 500px; height: auto;">

  <img src="imgs/tzy_git.png" style="width: 500px; height: auto;">
  
</div>


## Thank you!

<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 100%;">
  <div style="font-size: 150%; text-align: center;">
    For any question, feel free to reach me at  mcabral@tudelft.nl, or at my office, 34 B-2-320.
  </div>
</div>
